jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Emami
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!
